string.text: Recapture Abandoned village for Lukash
You have been tasked to defend a faction territory. Report back to Lukash after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]I have an important mission if you are willing. Duty has taken over %c[ui_orange]Abandoned village%c[ui_8] and I need an infiltrator to reclaim it.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Excellent. Well done.
Recapture Barrier for Lukash
Need to recapture Barrier and report back to Lukash after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]There is a problem here! We lost the %c[ui_orange]Barrier%c[ui_8]. I need your help to get it back before Monolith invades.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Is the enemy defeated? Good job!
Capture North-western outpost for Lukash
You have been tasked to capture North-western outpost and report back to Lukash after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]There's a job. One of the camps of interest to Freedom is occupied by a enemy forces. It's the %c[ui_orange]North-western outpost%c[ui_8]. We need to fix this situation. So, what do you say, man? Will you help?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
The task is completed? Great job.
Take the USB stick from the stash and bring it to Lukash
Go to the specified location, take the USB stick from the stash, and bring it to Lukash.

%c[ui_8]Our guy has infiltrated the enemy and is leaking useful intel to us. To avoid blowing his cover, he has to act carefully, avoiding contact with our fighters and leaving information in special drop points. I've got the coordinates of a stash where you need to retrieve a USB stick with the data. So, what do you say - you in?
Great, you did well, man! Here's your reward.
Find the %s artefact for Skinflint
You have been asked to retrieve the %s artefact. Bring it back to Skinflint if you happen to get your hands on one.
We've got a job from our sponsors. We need an artefact. Would you like to help?
%c[ui_8]We've got a job from our sponsors. We need the %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] artefact, have you heard of it? Can you get it for us? And I will pay you well.
Great job, stalker. Here's what I promised.
Assassinate one of Monolith for Skinflint
Skinflint has tasked you with finding and eliminating a member of Monolith.

%c[ui_8]There's a job... Dangerous, yeah. No matter how much we ask our people, no one wants to take it on, maybe you'll be the one to step up. The Monolith keeps breaking through the Barrier over and over again. We can barely hold them back. But I have an idea on how to stop it, at least for a while. We need someone to sneak into their territory and take one man, who, according to our intel, is coordinating the attacks. What do you say? Are there any real heroes left in the Zone?
Ah, you survived! Man, you've got a set on you. Great job.
Assassinate one of Duty for Skinflint
Skinflint has tasked you with finding and eliminating one of the Duty.
%c[ui_8]There is a certain individual who has been very loud in his opposition to Freedom and needs to be quieted. Are you any good at shutting people up?
Great! You do us proud. Here is what I promised.
Hunt Mutants for Skinflint
You have been tasked to eliminate the mutant threat. Report back after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]Mutants have been spotted nearby, making the area even more dangerous. I'm looking for someone to handle the cleanup. Can you help with this, man?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Fantastic! Here is your reward.
Long-standing feud
%s from killed Duty.
Kill several Duty stalkers and bring their patches as a prove.
%c[ui_8]I pay for the heads of our old enemies. %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] from a dozen of Duty will a proof that the Zone has gained more freedom.
Good job! Here is your payment.
Find %s for Screw
%s are required by Screw to install basic equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Yo, man. Are you interested in doing a job for me? I need specific tools to operate on weapons.
%c[ui_8]Good, I need a %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. I will pay you if you can bring a set back to me.
Thanks, man! I knew there was a reason I asked you. You look like a man who can get shit done.
Find %s for Screw
%s are required by Screw to install advanced equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Haha, I hate to ask. But I could really use more tools. You brought me what I have asked last time but I need a higher quality set. Can you help out again?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
You keep this shit up, everyone around here is going to love you. Thanks, man.
Find %s for Screw
%s are required by Screw to install expert equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Haha, I hate to ask. But I could really use more tools. You brought me what I have asked last time but I need a higher quality set. Can you help out again?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
You keep this shit up, everyone around here is going to love you. Thanks, man.
Find %s for Screw
Screw asked for %s. It needs to be in good condition.
I need a certain gun to use it for spare parts. If you are interested in the job, I will give you more details. What would you say?

%c[ui_8]A job for a good guy is always available. I need different guns. Right now, I need %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] in good condition. If you get your hands on one, bring it here. If it's totally wrecked, no worries, we can fix it up. Use %c[ui_orange]gunsmith kit%c[ui_8] for that. If you don't have one, I can help, but, man, it's gonna cost you...
Great! Exactly what I need.
Find the %s artefact for Herbalist
Herbalist has asked you to find a rare artefact called the %s.
We need an artifact - not just any, but one that heals and has no harmful effects. Bring it back, and I'll make sure you get paid well.

%c[ui_8]Listen, man, there's a job only someone who can walk through anomalies with their eyes closed can handle. We need an artifact - not just any, but one that heals and has no harmful effects. It's called the %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. You've definitely heard of it, right? Bring it to me, and I'll make sure you get paid well.
Great job, man! Here's your reward.
